---
title = "Configuration"
---

*Calepin* is configured through `_calepin/config.toml` and TOML front matter.

## Project settings

The `_calepin/config.toml` file controls site-wide settings:

```toml
title = "My Website"
target = "website"
```

## Document settings

Each `.qmd` file can override settings in its TOML front matter:

```
---
title = "My Page"
---
```
